creator: mitsurushie@gmail.com
text:
editors/openoffice.org-3 compilation error, error messages are contained in the attached file.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: type following commands:

cd /usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3
make -DWITH_EVOLUTION2 -DWITH_SYSTEM_FREETYPE -DWITH_SYSTEM_ICU LOCALIZED_LANG=zh-TW
